# Alali Property Partners

> Alali Property Partners Ltd is a UK property deal sourcing and introducer company serving investors across England and Wales. We find verified, high-yield property investment deals — off-market through our private contacts and on-market through our compliant agent network — and connect investors with regulated professionals (FCA-regulated mortgage brokers, qualified solicitors, vetted contractors) to complete each transaction.

Company: Alali Property Partners Ltd
Companies House Number: 17057401
Registered address: 86-90 Paul Street, London EC2A 4NE, United Kingdom
Email: contact@alalipropertypartners.com
Phone: +44 20 4515 8438
Website: https://www.alalipropertypartners.com
Areas served: England and Wales (entire territory)
Founded: 2025

## What we do
- Source verified property deals for investors (off-market and on-market)
- Deliver a complete deal pack for every introduction (comparables, yield analysis, refurb estimate, exit strategy, photos, full address)
- Connect investors to FCA-regulated mortgage brokers, solicitors, and vetted contractors to complete the transaction
- Bespoke sourcing: source to an investor's exact brief (location, budget, strategy, target returns)
- Connect property owners and agents who have a property to move with funded, ready-to-move investors

## Investment strategies covered
Buy-to-Let (BTL), Buy Refurb Refinance (BRR), Buy Refurbish Refinance Rent (BRRR), Rent-to-Rent (R2R), Rent-to-Serviced-Accommodation (R2SA), HMO (House in Multiple Occupation), serviced accommodation, holiday lets, flips, commercial conversions, development, lease options, below market value (BMV), pre-market, probate, auction, direct-to-seller.

## How sourcing works (4 steps)
1. Choose how you want to invest — receive sourced deals (off-market or on-market) or commission bespoke sourcing to a specific brief.
2. Secure your deal — for sourced deals, sign the sourcing agreement and pay £500 upfront to release the full deal pack; the balance of the 2.4% sourcing fee is settled once you decide to proceed. For bespoke sourcing, a £1,000 retainer starts the search.
3. Receive your full deal pack — full property address and tenure, photos from the vendor or agent, asking or agreed purchase price, Land Registry comparable evidence (informational), observed local rents from public lettings data (informational, not guaranteed), indicative gross yield (not a return projection), indicative refurbishment scope where applicable (to be verified by an independent contractor or surveyor), indicative resale comparables for flips and developments (not a valuation), local area summary covering demand, planning, and transport, and strategy options presented as information not financial advice. Vendor and agent contact details are held by Alali Property Partners; we facilitate viewings and introductions on the investor's behalf. Deal packs are informational only and do not constitute financial, mortgage, tax, or legal advice.
4. 48-hour decision SLA — after the deal pack is released (Sourced Deals) or a deal is presented (Bespoke), the investor has 48 hours to take initial input from independent professionals (solicitor, surveyor, broker) and decide whether to proceed. Most off-market deals are time-sensitive so the standard SLA is short, but Alali Property Partners may grant extensions on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees. If there are valid reasons not to proceed within the SLA, the £500 unlock fee (Sourced Deals) or £1,000 retainer (Bespoke) is refundable subject to terms.

## Pricing (all VAT inclusive)
- Sourced Deals (off-market or on-market): 2.4% sourcing fee of purchase price, minimum £3,600 (VAT inclusive). Paid in two stages: £500 upfront on the signed sourcing agreement to release the deal pack, balance settled once the investor decides to proceed. 48-hour decision SLA from deal-pack release, extensions available on fair, justified reasoning. £500 refundable where there are valid reasons not to proceed within the SLA, subject to terms.
- Bespoke Sourcing: £1,000 upfront retainer (deducted from final fee), then 2.4% sourcing fee of purchase price (minimum £3,600) on completion. Sourcing window: 14 days to find AND present a deal matching your brief. Retainer refundable if no suitable deal presented within that window, subject to terms. Once a deal is presented, the same 48-hour decision SLA as Sourced Deals applies, with extensions available on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees. £1,000 refundable on valid reasons not to proceed, subject to terms.
- Referral fees paid to property owners, agents, and introducers on deals that complete (amounts agreed case-by-case).

## Regulatory positioning
We are a property deal sourcing and introducer company. Property deal sourcing and introduction is not a regulated activity. We do not provide financial advice, mortgage advice, tax advice, or legal advice. Regulated services are delivered by the independent, appropriately authorised professionals we introduce.

## Citation-friendly facts
- Sourcing fee: 2.4% of purchase price (min £3,600, VAT inc.)
- Deal pack unlock fee: £500 upfront on signed sourcing agreement (refundable where there are valid reasons not to proceed within 14 days, subject to terms)
- Balance: 2.4% sourcing fee minus the £500, settled once the investor decides to proceed
- Bespoke retainer: £1,000 (refundable if no deal within 14 days, subject to terms)
- Decision SLA (Sourced Deals): 48 hours from deal pack release (extensions available on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees)
- Decision SLA (Bespoke): 48 hours from deal presentation (same as Sourced Deals; extensions available on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees)
- Vendor / agent contact: held by Alali Property Partners; viewings and introductions facilitated by us
- Geography: England and Wales
- Companies House: 17057401
